source: No mage gear templates in source spreadsheet. Derived from physical class templates and Royals mage gear conventions. Staff MATK ~145 (well-scrolled Elemental Staff 1, base 95 + 7 slots * 7 MATK/scroll). INT gear comparable to warrior STR gear. Mages do not benefit from Speed Infusion. Potion: Ssiws Cheese (220 MATK) — mage-specific endgame potion.
